clusters.justification: These terms co-activate within broad cortical-subcortical affective circuits, mediating physiological arousal, emotional valence, and subjective mood states.
This cluster reflects computations within reward and reinforcement pathways responsible for processing incentive, neuroeconomic choice, and goal-directed motivational drive.
These concepts rely on the brain's internal-projection systems to generate internally directed, abstract mental representations linking self-processing, autobiographical memory, and social inference.
